issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error scenarios or edge cases comprehensively.

scenarios.name: Write SodaCL checks for orders freshness, completeness, validity
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented SodaCL syntax: freshness(created_at) < 2h, missing_count, duplicate_count, invalid_count with valid values list; baseline writes generic SQL assertions and misses the YAML check DSL.

scenarios.name: Programmatic scan that fails CI on data quality issues
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Scan() with set_data_source_name, add_configuration_yaml_file, add_sodacl_yaml_str, scan.execute(), and scan.has_check_fails() per the skill; baseline invents an SDK shape and misses the failure-check method.
